---
title: "A goal to be more active on Github in 2024"
author: "Peter Hoang"
date: "2023-12-24"
categories: [goal]
---

I was never active on Github. That may sound strange to many, especially given that I've been in software for almost 1.5 decade. 

Before, I was busy building software products that I didn't have the chance to be active on Github.

In 2024, as <a href="/about.html#short-cv" target="_blank">I'm back to school</a> to strengthen my AI knowledge and skills, I set a goal to be more intentional about sharing what I know. Given my workload, I want to focus on simple, yet helpful, actions that I can maintain to build up my muscle strength. 

Some simple actions that I can start doing include:

- Share useful AI tools and papers. 
- Star the repos I like.
- Continue to update and add new content to this Github blog.

Hope to see you around at this Github blog and <a href="https://github.com/peterhungh3" target="_blank">my Github repo</a>.
